footer.tagline: B2B wholesale supply of ingredients for bakeries and HoReCa in Astana. 10 years on the market.
footer.trust: 10 years on the market · 50+ customers · delivery across Astana

hero.title: Wholesale supply for bakeries, cafes, and pastry chefs in Astana.
hero.subtitle: Wholesale and in stock.

s1.title: Restaurant / cafe / hotel
s1.desc: Regular wholesale supply, dedicated account manager, e-invoices.

s2.title: Bakery / pastry shop

s3.title: Independent pastry maker
s3.desc: Wholesale prices without your own warehouse — through group buying.

subscriptionLanding.title: Supply subscription
subscriptionLanding.lead: Tired of tracking when you'll run out? Set up a subscription — we'll deliver on schedule and remind you ahead of time.

groupBuyingLanding.title: Group buying
groupBuyingLanding.lead: Small bakeries and independent pastry makers pool orders to buy a single SKU at the wholesale price.
